Vendor FAQ

Click a topic to expand it, then click any question to see the answer.

Registration — How to register and what to expect
How do I register as a vendor?

Log in with your email, click Register, fill out the form, and submit. You'll receive a one-time verification code to log in — no password needed.

Can I edit my registration after submitting?

No. If you need to make changes, contact the organizers with your registration ID.

How do I register multiple booths?

Each booth requires a separate registration. After submitting one, start a new one from your dashboard.

Approval & Payment — What happens after you submit
What happens after I submit my registration?

Your registration goes to Pending Review. The organizers will review it and you'll be notified by email when a decision is made. You can check your status anytime on your dashboard.

Not seeing the email? Check your spam folder. You can always log in to check your status directly.

How do I pay after being approved?

Visit your registration from the dashboard. You'll see a payment form with the amount due. Payment is processed securely through Stripe — your card information never touches our server.

How urgently should I pay?

Pay as soon as possible. The organizers may revoke your approval if payment is delayed.

{% if settings and settings.refund_policy %}
What is the refund policy?

{{ settings.refund_policy | sanitize_html }}

Refunds can only be issued by the organizers after a paid registration is cancelled.

{% endif %}
Insurance — What's required and how to upload
Do I need insurance to participate?

Yes. All vendors must provide proof of liability insurance. Upload your certificate through the insurance page on your dashboard.

When should I upload my insurance document?

As soon as possible, ideally when you submit your registration or shortly after.

{% if settings and settings.insurance_instructions %}
Where can I get insurance?

{{ settings.insurance_instructions | sanitize_html }}

{% endif %}
Status & Withdrawal — What each status means and how to withdraw
What do the different statuses mean?
StatusWhat It MeansWhat To Do
Pending ReviewSubmitted, waiting for organizer review.No action needed.
ApprovedApproved — a booth slot is reserved for you.Pay as soon as possible.
PaidPayment complete. Your booth is confirmed.Make sure your insurance is uploaded.
DeclinedThe organizers were unable to approve your registration.Check the reason provided.
CancelledYour paid registration was cancelled.Check your email for refund details.
WithdrawnYou voluntarily withdrew.Submit a new registration if you change your mind.
How do I withdraw my registration?

Open your registration from the dashboard, scroll to Withdraw Registration, and confirm. You can withdraw while in Pending Review or Approved status. Once you've paid, only the organizers can cancel.

Withdrawal is permanent. If you change your mind, you'll need to submit a new registration.

{% if settings and settings.contact_email %}

Questions? Email us at {{ settings.contact_email }}. Include your registration ID if you have one.

{% endif %} {% endblock %}
